# contributing

thanks for taking the time to contribute.

## how to contribute

1. fork the repository and create a branch from `main`.
2. make your changes. keep the scope focused.
3. test locally by opening `index.html` or serving with any static server.
4. open a pull request against `main`.

## guidelines

- match existing code style and formatting.
- keep `index.html` self-contained. avoid external build tools.
- verify accessibility (aria labels, keyboard navigation, focus states).
- test both dark and light themes.
- ensure responsive behavior on mobile and desktop.

## issues

- use [bug reports](../issue_template/bug_report.md) for defects.
- use [feature requests](../issue_template/feature_request.md) for enhancements.
